fields.helpText: This field holds a list of Medical reasons for various areas of Medicine. Examples:  Explain reasons for Pacemaker, Reason for stopping for PFT, etc.

fields.setOfCodes: E:REASON FOR STOPPING (ETT);P:REASON FOR PACEMAKER GENERATOR CHANGE;L:PACEMAKER LEAD CHANGE;R:REPROGAMMING PACEMAKER;T:REASON FOR TRANSMITTING REPORT;PF:REASON FOR STOPPING (PFT);
fields.helpText: This field is used as a screen to differentiate which area of Medicine the reason is associated with.
